rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited each load-bearing claim against the evidence, identifying several unsupported claims and methodological gaps.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not consistently mark confidence for all recommendations or missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed entirely within the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: The agent identified potential harms but had minor regressions in addressing all possible issues.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked proper annotation.
